combined_text: DHCP: Port 67 (DHCP server port for IPv4) should not be in use by any other process Docs Previous Versions Windows DHCP: Port 67 (DHCP server port for IPv4) should not be in use by any other process September 11, 2012 2 minutes to read In this article Issue Impact Resolution To configure DHCP to use port 67Additional references Applies To: Windows Server 2008 R2, Windows Server 201
